basic_details.job_title: BEL Project Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Bharat Electronics Limited (BEL) Project Engineer-I Notification 2026 has been released on 17 June 2026 on the official website. A total of 9 vacancies have been announced through the BEL Project Engineer-I Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 32 years Age Relaxation: 3 years for OBC, 5 years for SC/ST, 10 years for PwBD in addition to category relaxation.

qualification.education_qualification: Full time BE/B.Tech in Electronics & Communication Engineering / Electronics / Telecommunication / Communication / Electronics & Telecommunication / Electrical & Electronics Engineering / Electrical Engineering / Mechanical / Computer Science / Electronics & Instrumentation / Instrumentation
qualification.details: Project Engineer-I (PRE-I(SSI-2026)): Full time BE/B.Tech in Electronics & Communication Engineering / Electronics / Telecommunication / Communication / Electronics & Telecommunication / Electrical & Electronics Engineering / Electrical Engineering / Mechanical / Computer Science Project Engineer-I (PRE-I(TSCS-2026)): Full time BE/B.Tech in Electronics & Communication / Electronics / Telecommunication / Communication / Electronics & Telecommunication / Electrical & Electronics Engineering / Electrical Engineering / Electronics & Instrumentation / Instrumentation

vacancy_details.Place of Posting: New Delhi, Gurgaon, Gandhinagar, Vizag, Kolkata, Kochi, Chennai, Portblair & Mumbai

post_wise_breakdown.place_of_posting: New Delhi, Gurgaon, Gandhinagar, Vizag, Kolkata, Kochi, Chennai, Portblair & Mumbai

salary_details.details: 1st year - Rs. 40,000/- 2nd year - Rs. 45,000/- 3rd year - Rs. 50,000/- 4th year - Rs. 55,000/- per month

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the BEL Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 04-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BEL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.bharat_electronics_bel: Full time BE/B.Tech in Electronics & Communication Engineering / Electronics / Telecommunication / Communication / Electronics & Telecommunication / Electrical & Electronics Engineering / Electrical Engineering / Mechanical / Computer Science / Electronics & Instrumentation / Instrumentation

content_sections.heading: BEL Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the BEL Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download BEL Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.place_of_posting: New Delhi, Gurgaon, Gandhinagar, Vizag, Kolkata, Kochi, Chennai, Portblair & Mumbai

content_sections.heading: BEL Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Project Engineer-I (PRE-I(SSI-2026)): Full time BE/B.Tech in Electronics & Communication Engineering / Electronics / Telecommunication / Communication / Electronics & Telecommunication / Electrical & Electronics Engineering / Electrical Engineering / Mechanical / Computer Science Project Engineer-I (PRE-I(TSCS-2026)): Full time BE/B.Tech in Electronics & Communication / Electronics / Telecommunication / Communication / Electronics & Telecommunication / Electrical & Electronics Engineering / Electrical Engineering / Electronics & Instrumentation / Instrumentation

content_sections.heading: BEL Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 32 years Age Relaxation: 3 years for OBC, 5 years for SC/ST, 10 years for PwBD in addition to category relaxation.

content_sections.heading: BEL Recruitment 2026 - Salary

rows.event: Last Date for Receipt of Applications

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the BEL Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 04-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BEL to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for BEL Project Engineer-I posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the BEL Project Engineer-I recruitment is 04-07-2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a full-time BE/B.Tech degree in specified engineering disciplines such as Electronics & Communication, Electrical, Mechanical, or Computer Science, among others.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for Project Engineer-I posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for Project Engineer-I posts is 32 years. Age relaxations are applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for Project Engineer-I in BEL?
faq.answer: Bharat Electronics has announced a total of 9 vacancies for the Project Engineer-I position across different specializations.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for Project Engineer-I?
faq.answer: The salary for Project Engineer-I is structured progressively, starting from Rs. 40,000/- in the first year and increasing to Rs. 55,000/- per month by the fourth year.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: General and OBC category candidates are required to pay an application fee of Rs. 472/-, which includes Rs. 400/- plus 18% GST.

faq.question: Q7. Are there any application fees for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for candidates belonging to the SC/ST categories for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for BEL Project Engineer-I?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview. Candidates need to perform well in both stages to be considered.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: No, the Project Engineer-I positions are contractual in nature. The contract period is typically for a specified duration, with potential for extension.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link are available in the "Important Links" section of this article. You can also visit the BEL official website.
